scripts.init: pnpm run init:check && pnpm run init:hooks
scripts.init:hooks: pnpm exec prek install --config prek.toml --hook-type pre-commit --prepare-hooks --overwrite
scripts.build:examples: pnpm run build:example:allocator-builtin && pnpm run build:example:allocator-custom && pnpm run build:example:basic && pnpm run build:example:benchmark && pnpm run build:example:init && pnpm run build:example:memory
scripts.build:example:allocator-builtin: pnpm run build:example:allocator-builtin:ohos-arm64 && pnpm run build:example:allocator-builtin:ohos-arm && pnpm run build:example:allocator-builtin:ohos-x64
scripts.build:example:allocator-custom: pnpm run build:example:allocator-custom:ohos-arm64 && pnpm run build:example:allocator-custom:ohos-arm && pnpm run build:example:allocator-custom:ohos-x64
scripts.build:example:basic: pnpm run build:example:basic:ohos-arm64 && pnpm run build:example:basic:ohos-arm && pnpm run build:example:basic:ohos-x64
scripts.build:example:benchmark: pnpm run build:example:benchmark:ohos-arm64 && pnpm run build:example:benchmark:ohos-arm && pnpm run build:example:benchmark:ohos-x64
scripts.build:example:init: pnpm run build:example:init:ohos-arm64 && pnpm run build:example:init:ohos-arm && pnpm run build:example:init:ohos-x64
scripts.build:example:memory: pnpm run build:example:memory:ohos-arm64 && pnpm run build:example:memory:ohos-arm && pnpm run build:example:memory:ohos-x64
scripts.format: pnpm run format:zig && pnpm run format:js
scripts.format:zig: zig fmt build.zig build.zig.zon src benchmark examples node-test test packages/zig-napi
scripts.format:js: pnpm exec oxk format benchmark examples memory-testing node-test packages/zig-napi test website/src website/vite.config.ts
scripts.precommit: pnpm run build:examples && pnpm run format && pnpm run lint
